category_sources: source_facts.description says library for communicating with USB and Bluetooth HID devices; official README describes HIDAPI as a cross-platform HID device library
display_name_sources: official README uses HIDAPI as the project name
docs_sources: official repository links libusb.info/hidapi as generated API documentation; official README documents usage and build information
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/libusb/hidapi; per instruction repo is returned as null
tags_sources: official README topics and description cover C, USB, Bluetooth, and HID back ends across operating systems
